testsuite.name: runner.botrunner

testcase.name: Bot automation Instagram mode selection
testcase.failure: java.util.NoSuchElementException at java.base/java.util.Scanner.throwFor(Scanner.java:962) at java.base/java.util.Scanner.next(Scanner.java:1619) at java.base/java.util.Scanner.nextInt(Scanner.java:2284) at java.base/java.util.Scanner.nextInt(Scanner.java:2238) at step.igDef.userSelectsModeViaConsole(igDef.java:30) at ✽.user selects mode via console(file:///D:/Pribadi/ASOKA/bot-instagram/bot-instagram/src/test/java/features/Instagram.feature:5)

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J: No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. May 25, 2025 11:42:22 AM org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverService$Builder getLogOutput INFO: Driver logs no longer sent to console by default; https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/drivers/service/#setting-log-output May 25, 2025 11:42:25 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 136 May 25, 2025 11:42:25 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for . You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.10.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
